Portfolio Projects

03
01 — Featured

dbt Analytics Showcase

Production-grade analytics engineering project on the Olist Brazilian E-Commerce dataset. Full Medallion architecture: staging → intermediate → marts, with 25+ tests and automated CI.

dbt Core DuckDB Python GitHub Actions 100k+ rows

5 dbt models
25+ Tests
3 Mart layers

02

Modern Data Pipeline

End-to-end ELT tracking GitHub trending repos. GitHub API → DuckDB → dbt → Evidence.dev dashboard. Orchestrated by Prefect with a daily scheduled run.

Who I am

About me

I'm a data analyst and analytics engineer based in France, with a background spanning pharmacy, retail management, and data — which gives me a uniquely practical lens on business problems.

I currently teach SQL, Python, BigQuery, and Power BI at Le Wagon, and work as a freelance data consultant. I'm also building two AI-powered SaaS products on the side.

Analytics & Transform
DBT BigQuery DuckDB SQL Power BI
Engineering & Infra
Python FastAPI Prefect Docker Supabase
Web & Viz
Next.js Evidence.dev Streamlit
Experience
2024 — Present
Data Instructor
Le Wagon · Bootcamp
Teaching SQL, Python, BigQuery, and Power BI to career-switchers. Delivered workshops on web scraping, dbt, and data pipelines.
2025 - Present
Solo Founder
LIFO.AI
Building a food waste reduction tool for retail, powered by AI-driven demand forecasting and inventory optimization.
2026
Solo Founder
AuditGuard AI · LIFO.AI
Building a compliance automation platform for SMBs, starting with GDPR audit automation.
2024 — Present
Freelance Data Analyst
Auto-entrepreneur
Freelance analytics and data engineering consulting. End-to-end pipelines, dashboards, and data strategy.
Before data
Fast Food Manager & Pharmacist
Multi-year experience
Background in pharmacy (Algeria) and multi-year fast food management — gives me an unusually strong business intuition.
Building in public

SaaS Products

🔨 Building

AuditGuard AI

// Compliance automation for security audits

Scans Google Drive for exposed sensitive data — PII, API keys, passwords. Generates audit-ready reports for SOC2, GDPR, and HIPAA. Built with Next.js, FastAPI, and Supabase.

  • 3-pass scanning model for accuracy
  • SOC2 / GDPR / HIPAA report generation
  • Google Drive integration
  • Real-time alerts on exposure
Next.js FastAPI Python Supabase Inngest
🌱 Beta

LIFO.AI

// Food waste reduction for retail stores

Intelligent scoring engine that predicts expiry risk per product and automates markdown decisions. Integrates with Square POS for real-time inventory sync.

  • Computer vision pipeline (roadmap)
  • 433-line Python scoring engine
  • Square POS integration
  • Auto / Manual batch tracking modes
Python FastAPI Supabase Square API
